title: euodia daniellii var. delavayi
intro: Euodia daniellii var. delavayi, also known as Chinese rowan or rowan tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, which is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Euodia daniellii var. delavayi include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
